Generate Summary GO Lollipop Facet Plot

Source: R/analysis.R
plot_summary_go_lollipop.Rd

Combines GO enrichment results from multiple loop types (e.g., E-P, P-P) and plots them side-by-side in a faceted lollipop chart, categorized by GO Ontology (BP, CC, MF).

Usage

plot_summary_go_lollipop(all_go_results, base_project_name, out_dir)

Arguments

all_go_results

List of data frames containing GO results.

base_project_name

Character. Prefix for output.

out_dir

Character. Output directory.

Value

Invisible NULL. Saves a combined PDF plot.

On this page
